text:
Some of my scripts make haevy use of the programm djpeg. After some 
invocation system just halts kompletly. Mouse pointer freezes no
ping replay and login ist possible. The problem startet 2 or 3 weeks
ago. I have been updating my system every week.

Fix: 

dont know by now.
How-To-Repeat: Start djpeg several times.
